verdict: PARTIAL — coef=+4632, p=0.353 (above α=0.10); direction inconclusive
falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is falsified if any of the following hold over 2021Q1-2023Q4 in the Eurozone aggregate or in at least 6 of 8 Eurozone Big-8 economies: (a) unit-profit contribution to GDP-deflator growth is below 25% of cumulative deflator growth, (b) real wages rise rather than fall in any 12-month window during 2021-2023, OR (c) wage growth leads price growth at any quarter during 2021-2023 in the Granger-causality sense at p<0.05. Additionally, falsification if 2024 disinflation is driven >50% by wage-side moderation rather than terms-of-trade reversal in the ECB decomposition.

estimate.method: statsmodels OLS FE fallback (linearmodels failed: No module named 'linearmodels')
